prompt: A dreamy, romantic East Asian garden illustration at blue-hour twilight, painted in a highly detailed anime-inspired fantasy style with soft glow and slightly abstract, heart-stirring atmosphere. In the right foreground, a graceful young woman in an elaborate traditional kimono sits demurely on worn stone steps beside a koi pond, holding a large wagasa paper umbrella above her shoulder. Her face is softly obscured and not sharply defined, keeping the mood poetic rather than portrait-realistic. Her hair is styled in a formal updo adorned with many pink cherry blossoms, dangling ornaments, and delicate hairpins. The kimono is pale icy blue with flowing layers and intricate patterns of orange koi fish, curling waves, and floral motifs; she wears white tabi socks and traditional sandals, and a patterned obi at her back. The umbrella is cream-colored with visible bamboo ribs and decorated with hanging crystal-like teardrop charms in pastel colors. The pond fills most of the scene, with exactly 10 blooming lotus flowers in pink, peach, and pale yellow, broad green lily pads, and exactly 9 visible koi fish in orange, white, black, and gold swimming in luminous swirling water. Tiny glowing fireflies and magical light specks float throughout the air and reflect on the pond surface. In the midground, an arched wooden bridge crosses the water. In the background, a serene Japanese garden extends with lush greenery, moss, shrubs, a stone lantern on the left, another warm garden lantern on the right, a small traditional pavilion with a dark tiled roof, and trees with red-orange autumn leaves mixed with deep green foliage. Add a few cherry blossom branches near the seated woman. Use cinematic composition, wide framing, rich color contrast between cool blue water and warm lantern light, delicate linework, painterly textures, reflective highlights, gentle depth haze, and an enchanting, elegant, slightly surreal mood.
